scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm for root dependencies. Run: corepack enable && pnpm install'); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.env:check: test -f .env || (echo 'Missing .env. Run: pnpm run dev:setup (or cp .env.example .env)' && exit 1)
scripts.up:light: node scripts/dev-setup.mjs && COMPOSE_PROFILES=light docker compose up -d && node scripts/dev-setup.mjs --print-urls
scripts.up:pipeline: pnpm run env:check && COMPOSE_PROFILES=pipeline docker compose up -d postgres minio minio-init airflow-init airflow-apiserver airflow-scheduler airflow-dag-processor
scripts.up:full: node scripts/dev-setup.mjs --profile full && COMPOSE_PROFILES=full docker compose up -d && node scripts/dev-setup.mjs --print-urls --profile full
scripts.check: pnpm run check:backend && pnpm run check:frontend && pnpm run check:ml
scripts.smoke: pnpm run env:check && (running="$(docker compose ps --status running --services backend frontend postgres | sort | tr '\n' ' ')"; test "$running" = "backend frontend postgres " || (echo "Smoke failed. Expected running services: backend frontend postgres. Actual: ${running:-none}" && exit 1))
scripts.smoke:pipeline: pnpm run env:check && (running="$(docker compose ps --status running --services airflow-apiserver postgres | sort | tr '\n' ' ')"; test "$running" = "airflow-apiserver postgres " || (echo "Smoke failed. Expected running services: airflow-apiserver postgres. Actual: ${running:-none}" && exit 1))
scripts.logs: pnpm run env:check && docker compose logs -f backend frontend
scripts.logs:pipeline: pnpm run env:check && docker compose logs -f airflow-apiserver airflow-scheduler airflow-dag-processor
scripts.ci:backend: cd backend && ./gradlew test jacocoTestCoverageVerification testPg build -x checkstyleMain -x checkstyleTest
scripts.e2e:frontend:install: pnpm --dir frontend exec playwright install --with-deps chromium
scripts.ci:frontend: pnpm run test:frontend:coverage && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.lint:ml: cd ml && uv run ruff check .
scripts.format:ml: cd ml && uv run ruff format .
scripts.format:ml:check: cd ml && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.ci:ml: pnpm run deps:ml && pnpm run test:ml:coverage
scripts.quality:ml: pnpm run lint:ml && pnpm run format:ml:check && pnpm run typecheck:ml && pnpm run test:ml
scripts.check:frontend: pnpm run deps:frontend && pnpm run ci:frontend && pnpm run e2e:frontend
scripts.ci: pnpm run ci:backend && pnpm run deps:frontend && pnpm run ci:frontend && pnpm run ci:ml
